reason: The text is a religious supplication in Arabic, asking for goodness in this world and the hereafter, and protection from the torment of fire. It does not show support, praise, or encouragement for ISIS activities, violence, or ideology.
original_post: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ . #دعاء .
